name: Red Eagle Food Store
description: Independent fuel and food store at I-90 Exit 58 in Buffalo with about 10 truck parking spaces, a restaurant and ATM.

name: Flying J Travel Center #762
description: Full-service Flying J travel center at I-90 Exit 126 with 24-hour diesel (6 lanes), showers, laundry, deli/fast food and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: Cenex Travel Plaza - Gillette
description: Cenex travel plaza at the Garner Lake Rd interchange (I-90 Exit 128) in Gillette with about 35 truck spaces, 5 diesel lanes, a convenience store, Gladiator Pizza & Subs and bulk DEF.

name: Coffee Cup Fuel Stop #5 (Cenex)
description: 24/7 Cenex-branded truck stop at I-90 Exit 154 (Hwy 16) in Moorcroft with diesel, about 20 truck spaces, private showers, a driver lounge and convenience store.

name: Sundance Travel Center (Conoco)
description: 24-hour Conoco travel center at I-90 Exit 189 in Sundance with diesel (3 lanes), about 15 truck spaces, showers and laundry.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Gillette
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Flying J Travel Center at I-90 Exit 126 in Gillette.

name: Sundance Port of Entry / Weigh Station
description: WYDOT/Wyoming Highway Patrol port of entry and truck scale on I-90 at Mile 189 (Exit 189) in Sundance; westbound trucks entering Wyoming from South Dakota must cross. PrePass accepted.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Gillette
description: Commercial, farm and OTR tire dealer in Gillette near I-90 with 24-hour commercial road service.

name: Manning's Wrecker Service
description: 24-hour towing and wrecker/recovery service in Gillette serving the I-90 oilfield corridor.

name: Red Lion Hotel Gillette by Sonesta
description: Hotel near the S Douglas Hwy / I-90 interchange (Exit 126) in Gillette offering free parking for cars, trucks, RVs and buses.

name: Howard Johnson by Wyndham Gillette
description: Gillette hotel just off I-90 offering free parking for trucks, buses and RVs in a spacious lot, within walking distance of downtown.

name: Moorcroft Rest Area
description: WYDOT rest area on I-90 near Mile 153 (Exit 154), both directions, with separate truck and car parking, restrooms and a covered picnic area.

name: Sundance Rest Area
description: WYDOT rest area on I-90 near Mile 189 (Exit 189), both directions, with about 5 commercial truck spaces, RV dump, restrooms and picnic area; adjacent to the Sundance port of entry.

name: Northeast Wyoming Welcome Center (Beulah)
description: State welcome and information center on I-90 near Beulah (about Exit 199) just west of the South Dakota line, with restrooms, travel information and parking.
